name: Amazon Echo Show 8 (3rd Gen, 2023)

specs.Speakers: Dual 2-inch full-range neodymium drivers + passive bass radiator, spatial audio
specs.Camera: 13 MP, center-aligned, auto-framing, digital pan and zoom
specs.Smart Home Hub: Zigbee 3.0, Matter 1.2 controller, Thread border router, Amazon Sidewalk
specs.Processor: MediaTek MT8188J + Amazon AZ2 Neural Processing Unit
specs.Content: 420+ live and ad-supported Fire TV channels, Prime Video, Netflix, Spotify
specs.Privacy: Physical camera shutter, hardware mic mute button

whatWorks: Built-in Zigbee, Matter, and Thread hub makes this a genuine smart home controller — Zigbee devices pair without a separate hub, and Matter devices from any brand connect natively. The strongest hub-per-dollar in this size class.
Centered 13MP camera makes video calls feel natural — looking at the screen now means looking near the camera lens, a meaningful improvement over the offset 2nd-gen camera.
Room-filling audio for an 8-inch display — dual neodymium drivers with passive bass radiator punch noticeably above expectations for the size and price.
40% faster on-device Alexa processing via AZ2 NPU — smart home light and plug commands respond nearly instantly without waiting for cloud round-trip lag.
worthKnowing: Full-screen sponsored ads have grown increasingly intrusive via OTA updates — they appear as interstitial ads in Photo Frame mode and between content cards, and Amazon has not provided a way to disable them entirely. Multiple owners and outlets flagged this as a growing pain point since 2024.
Display resolution (1280 × 800) and visible bezels lag behind tablet-class screens at the same price — functional but not premium when used purely as a picture frame.

Alexa voice recordings may be reviewed by Amazon contractors for quality improvement. Users concerned about audio privacy should review the Alexa privacy dashboard and set recordings to auto-delete. Physical mic mute is available.
No eero built-in (unlike Echo Show 15) — still requires a separate Wi-Fi router.

commonComplaints.title: Full-screen sponsored ads interrupt Photo Frame…
commonComplaints.body: Full-screen sponsored ads interrupt Photo Frame mode and content browsing — it's gotten noticeably worse since 2024 and feels like a billboard I paid for

commonComplaints.title: Display resolution is adequate but not…
commonComplaints.body: Display resolution is adequate but not impressive — text and images look slightly soft compared to tablet-class screens at this price

commonComplaints.title: Alexa still makes comprehension errors on…
commonComplaints.body: Alexa still makes comprehension errors on complex or multi-part commands — smart home reliability is strong but natural language stumbles

commonComplaints.title: No eero built-in like the Echo…
commonComplaints.body: No eero built-in like the Echo Show 15 — missed integration opportunity at this price

verdict: The Echo Show 8 (3rd Gen) is the right size and price for most households — the centered camera, built-in Zigbee/Matter/Thread hub, and faster processor are genuine upgrades that make it the best Amazon smart display for the money. The growing intrusion of full-screen sponsored ads is a real and worsening nuisance Amazon controls via OTA updates. Buy it knowing you're getting a capable smart home hub that also serves as an ad surface.

realBuyers.quote: The Echo Show 8 (3rd Gen) is the Alexa-powered smart display to get if you want a larger display but not one that's too large for your kitchen or bedroom.
The centered camera means you look right at the screen during video calls instead of slightly off to the right. Sounds minor but makes a real difference.
Full-screen ads with the 'sponsored' tag are now appearing between my photos in Frame mode. I didn't buy this to watch ads.
Even 15 feet away, the auto-framing camera kept me in the shot and followed me around the room.

sources.title: Amazon Echo Show 8 (3rd Gen) review — Tom's Guide
Amazon Echo Show 8 (3rd gen) review — TechRadar
Obnoxious full-screen ads are making Echo Show useless — Tom's Guide

metaDescription: Amazon Echo Show 8 3rd Gen review for Canada: Zigbee/Matter hub, 13MP centered camera, spatial audio, faster Alexa. Ad complaints, privacy notes, and Canadian pricing.
introText: The Amazon Echo Show 8 (3rd Gen) is the mid-size smart display in Amazon's lineup, featuring a 13MP centered camera, built-in Zigbee/Matter/Thread hub, and 40% faster Alexa processing — making it the best smart home controller in the 8-inch display class. Available on Amazon.ca (ASIN B0BLS3Y632) at around $169 CAD.
